turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I'm looking to get a second opinion on my MRI report. A doctor at another hospital suggested surgery for my spine. I want another view.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely, second opinions are very important. Our orthopaedic surgeon Dr. Pramod Joshi or our neurosurgeon can review spinal MRIs. Which would you prefer?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Neurosurgeon might be more relevant. My name is Harsha Rao, 9811234560.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Harsha. Dr. Vinay Kapoor is our neurosurgeon. He holds clinic on Tuesdays and Thursdays. Earliest is this Thursday at 11:30 AM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday 11:30 is fine. Should I bring the original MRI CD?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, please bring the MRI CD or prints and any reports from the other hospital. The more Dr. Kapoor has to review the better.
